## Rust Latest Documentation References

Always use latest stable Rust docs when generating or reviewing Rust code:
- Standard Library: https://doc.rust-lang.org/stable/std/
- Rust Reference: https://doc.rust-lang.org/reference/
- Rust Book: https://doc.rust-lang.org/book/
- Cargo Book: https://doc.rust-lang.org/cargo/
- Edition Guide (2024): https://doc.rust-lang.org/edition-guide/
- Clippy Lints: https://rust-lang.github.io/rust-clippy/
- Crates.io: https://crates.io/
- Docs.rs: https://docs.rs/
